top_signals.title: Trump’s Truth Social withdraws bitcoin ETF application from SEC
top_signals.summary: Its advisor, Yorkville America, said the withdrawal is a strategic move to reapply under a more efficient securities framework.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
Strikes Hit Two Australian LNG Facilities After Wage Talks Collapse
top_signals.summary: Maintenance workers at two offshore LNG facilities in Australia went on strike after failing to reach an agreement on wage terms with their employer, engineering major UGL. “The end result of UGL's inability to negotiate or accept industrial standards is protected industrial action,” trade union group the Offshore Alliance, which represents the workers, said in a statement as quoted by Reuters. The strike will affect Woodside’s North West Shelf LNG facility as well as the neighboring Pluto LNG project, also operated by the Australian…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Watch: Kitada Explains Gender Mainstreaming
top_signals.summary: The IMO and World Maritime University (WMU) have released a new Handbook on Gender Mainstreaming in the Maritime Sector, calling for action to address persistent gender inequality across the global maritime industry.The handbook, authored by WMU Professor Momoko Kitada…
